resources.string: Glyph Matrix host app for the old Digivice V1 GameMaker emulator
Separate Nothing Glyph app for porting the abandoned GameMaker Digivice Android build.
Nothing Glyph Matrix detected. Toy service can bind to Glyph hardware.
Nothing Glyph Matrix detected, but the master Glyph switch is off. Enable Glyphs in system settings before starting the Digivice.
Glyph Matrix not detected on this device. The app can still be built, but hardware output will not activate.

The first native runtime slice is live: Digivice V1 save data, step progression, 500-step encounter logic, starter selection, and a real stateful Glyph renderer are wired. Battle flow and sprite-faithful rendering still need more porting work.

The phone view mirrors the same runtime used by the Glyph service. From idle, B opens the six-item menu, C opens the distance and step pager, pressing C again advances those pages, and vertical flicks count steps. Auto Walk is an app-only helper toggle and is not part of the Digivice menu flow.
Notification permission is required to keep the preview service alive.
Running the native Digivice V1 Glyph runtime.
